description_long: This is a young adult male with a medium build, dressed in casual urban attire. He wears a short-sleeved t-shirt with a v-neck, fitted pants, and sturdy lace-up boots suitable for walking. His hands are covered with fingerless gloves, adding a touch of style and utility. The figure has medium-length, slightly tousled hair and a clean-shaven face. The overall appearance suggests a modern city dweller, possibly a commuter or someone out for a walk in an urban environment.
description: A casually dressed young adult male with a v-neck t-shirt, fitted pants, boots, and fingerless gloves, featuring medium-length tousled hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the v-neck t-shirt, gloves, facial features, and boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the back of the t-shirt, pants, and hair.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved t-shirt, fitted pants, fingerless gloves, and lace-up boots
